guard_checks.mutation_scope: prep artifact only; no canonical JSONL, canonical.db, identity-overrides, LOG.md, manifest, wiki, materialized, generated-output, submission, or source files intentionally changed

existing_alias_conflicts.checked_with: sqlite3 data/canonical.db identity_aliases plus jq data/identity-overrides/merges.json aliases.entity for proposed alias ids

do_not_merge_conflicts.checked_with: sqlite3 data/canonical.db do_not_merge for exact pairs plus jq data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json pairs.entity for proposed alias ids

record_existence.checked_with: sqlite3 data/canonical.db records for all alias_id and target_id values; all are record_kind entity

candidate_basis.method: deterministic local inspection of canonical.db records, entities, evidence_refs, identity_aliases, do_not_merge, identity-overrides JSON, prior prep artifacts, and raw source evidence blocks
